name: interactive-diagram
description: Build beautiful, interactive technical diagrams (system / architecture / sequence / flow) as a single self-contained HTML file — pure HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS, no build step. Tabbed multi-view, pan / zoom / drag, connected-chain highlight, double-click pin, dark mode (Tokyo Night), overlap auto-fix, and SVG / PNG export. Plus a static, slide-ready platform-architecture poster mode with a built-in overflow / overlap audit, one-click auto-fix, and download-fixed-HTML.
